name: Chunky Cat Barf
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti squash.
2. Fork out the insides into a large casserole dish.
3. Add the cottage cheese, half of the grated mozzarella and parmesan cheeses, and the spaghetti sauce.
4. Mix everything together until it resembles the name of the dish.
5. Top with the remaining cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
Note: You could substitute spaghetti noodles for the squash.
